task_completion.description: Open and read the leadership_schedule.txt file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/leadership_schedule.txt' showing the dates and times for the training sessions.
Odoo Calendar interface showing a saved event or event creation form titled 'Leadership 101' on the first scheduled date.
Odoo Calendar interface showing a saved event or event creation form titled 'Leadership 101' on the second scheduled date.
Odoo Calendar interface showing a saved event or event creation form titled 'Leadership 101' on the third scheduled date.

task_completion.description: Set the correct location and description for the events
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event details form in Odoo showing 'Board Room' in the Location field and 'Core leadership principles for new managers.' in the Description field.

task_completion.description: Add 'Alice Johnson' and 'Frank Rivera' as attendees
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event details form in Odoo showing 'Alice Johnson' and 'Frank Rivera' added as attendees/participants.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo Calendar web interface to create the events
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web application running in a web browser, rather than terminal commands or python scripts interacting with the Odoo API.

integrity.description: The agent created three separate events rather than a single recurring event
integrity.visual_evidence: The event creation forms do not have the 'Recurrent' checkbox checked, or the calendar view shows three distinct events without recurrence icons.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened the provided schedule file
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot shows the 'leadership_schedule.txt' file open in an editor or terminal, proving the agent didn't hallucinate the dates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The events must be named exactly 'Leadership 101'. The location must be 'Board Room'. The attendees must include 'Alice Johnson' and 'Frank Rivera'. The description must contain 'Core leadership principles for new managers.'. The schedule file is located at '/home/ga/Documents/leadership_schedule.txt' and contains the specific dates (next Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday) and times for the three sessions. All three events must be created as separate, individual events (no recurrence).
